notes: Shape files (SVG) are not yet created. This index defines the catalogue contract — every entry here corresponds to a file that must exist at shapes/{category}/{name}.svg before Module 3b can render it. Primitives (rectangle, triangle, oval, circle, line, wave) are generated at runtime and do not need SVG files.

shapes.name: cat_sitting
shapes.description: Cat in a sitting position, facing forward-left. Clear ear silhouette, tail curled beside body. No facial detail beyond basic head shape.

shapes.name: cat_standing
shapes.description: Cat standing in profile, facing right. Four legs visible, tail raised. Ear and head shape clearly defined.

shapes.name: dog_sitting
shapes.description: Dog sitting, facing forward. Floppy ears, rounded body. Simple silhouette, no breed-specific detail.

shapes.name: dog_standing
shapes.description: Dog standing in profile, facing right. Four legs, tail up, ears visible.

shapes.name: bird_flying
shapes.description: Bird in flight, wings spread, seen from slightly above. Simple M-shape wings with body below.

shapes.name: bird_perched
shapes.description: Small bird perched on a horizontal branch, facing right. Round body, beak, tail feathers.

shapes.name: fish
shapes.description: Simple fish in profile, facing right. Oval body, tail fin, single dorsal fin. No scales detail.

shapes.name: butterfly
shapes.description: Butterfly, wings open, seen from above. Four wing lobes clearly separated. No wing pattern detail.

shapes.name: rabbit
shapes.description: Rabbit sitting upright, facing forward. Tall ears, round body, small visible front paws.

shapes.name: elephant
shapes.description: Elephant in profile, facing right. Large body, distinct trunk curving downward, visible ear.

shapes.name: bear
shapes.description: Bear standing on all fours, profile view facing right. Rounded ears, large body, short legs.

shapes.name: lion
shapes.description: Lion facing forward, seated. Distinctive mane ring around head. Simple face, no fine detail.

shapes.name: owl
shapes.description: Owl sitting upright, facing forward. Large circular eye sockets (empty — no iris detail), ear tufts, rounded body with wing outlines.

shapes.name: horse
shapes.description: Horse in profile, standing or mid-trot, facing right. Mane and tail clearly outlined. Four legs.

shapes.name: duck
shapes.description: Duck in profile on water, facing right. Distinct flat bill, round body, small tail. Optional water line below.

shapes.name: frog
shapes.description: Frog seen from above, legs spread in mid-jump. Round body, four limbs extended, bulging eye bumps.

shapes.name: turtle
shapes.description: Turtle in profile, facing right. Domed hexagonal-patterned shell (simplified: dome outline only, no internal pattern), head and four limbs visible.

shapes.name: boat_small
shapes.description: Small rowing or motorboat hull in profile. No mast. Simple curved hull, flat deck line.

shapes.name: boat_sailboat
shapes.description: Sailboat in profile. Hull, vertical mast, one large triangular sail. Optional small wave beneath hull.

shapes.name: car_simple
shapes.description: Simple car in profile, facing right. Rounded cabin, two circular wheels (outline only), no window detail.

shapes.name: bicycle
shapes.description: Bicycle in profile, facing right. Two large wheels (circle outlines), frame triangle, handlebars and seat visible.

shapes.name: airplane
shapes.description: Airplane in profile, facing right. Fuselage, two wings (one visible main wing, one tail wing), engine nacelle.

shapes.name: train_simple
shapes.description: Steam locomotive in profile, facing right. Circular wheels, smokestack, cab. No fine mechanical detail.

shapes.name: rocket
shapes.description: Rocket pointing upward. Cone nose, cylindrical body, three fins at base. Optional flame plume below.

shapes.name: tree_simple
shapes.description: Simple deciduous tree. Round or oval canopy outline, straight trunk. No internal branch detail.

shapes.name: flower_simple
shapes.description: Simple flower with 5-6 oval petals around a central circle, on a straight stem with two leaves.

shapes.name: sun
shapes.description: Sun: central circle with 8 evenly spaced rays radiating outward. Rays are straight lines or short triangles.

shapes.name: moon
shapes.description: Crescent moon, horns pointing right. Thick crescent outline, no surface detail. Classic quarter-moon shape.

shapes.name: star
shapes.description: Five-pointed star outline. Equal-length points, classic symmetrical star shape.

shapes.name: cloud
shapes.description: Fluffy cloud outline. Three or four overlapping rounded bumps forming the top, flat base. No internal detail.

shapes.name: mountain
shapes.description: Two overlapping mountain peaks. Larger peak in front, smaller behind. Optional snow cap triangle at each peak.

shapes.name: wave
shapes.description: Single ocean wave: a horizontal S-curve with a curling crest. Captures the feel of a breaking wave.

shapes.name: leaf
shapes.description: Single leaf, roughly oval with pointed tip, on a short stem. One central vein line only.

shapes.name: house_simple
shapes.description: Simple house: square body, triangular roof, one central door rectangle. No windows (too small for tactile).

shapes.name: castle_tower
shapes.description: Single castle tower: rectangular body with battlements (merlons) at top. Optional arched doorway at base.

shapes.name: lighthouse
shapes.description: Lighthouse: tapered cylindrical tower, lantern room near top (small square or hexagon), horizontal stripe band on tower body.

shapes.name: person_standing
shapes.description: Stick-figure-adjacent person: circular head, oval body, two arms out, two legs down. No facial detail.

shapes.name: person_child
shapes.description: Small person figure: proportionally larger head than adult figure, shorter body. Standing upright.

shapes.name: person_waving
shapes.description: Person figure with one arm raised and slightly bent in a wave gesture. Same proportions as person_standing.

shapes.name: book
shapes.description: Open book, seen from slightly above. Two rectangular pages, central spine, pages slightly curved.

shapes.name: hat_pirate
shapes.description: Classic pirate bicorne hat in profile. Wide brim curving up on both sides, skull-and-crossbones emblem outline on front (simplified: two crossed bones, no skull detail).

shapes.name: crown
shapes.description: Crown with five points. Rectangular base band, five upward triangular points. No gemstone detail.

shapes.name: key
shapes.description: Skeleton key in profile. Round bow (loop) at top, straight shank, two or three teeth at bottom.

shapes.name: heart
shapes.description: Classic heart shape outline. Two rounded lobes at top, pointed bottom.

shapes.name: apple
shapes.description: Apple outline: rounded body with slight indent at top where stem attaches. Short stem and one leaf.

shapes.name: umbrella
shapes.description: Umbrella open, seen from the side. Semicircular canopy with scalloped edge, straight handle with hook at bottom.
